---
name: Gold label dispute
about: Argue that a scenario's expected answer is wrong or ambiguous
title: "gold-label: <scenario-id>"
labels: gold-label
---

**Scenario:** <!-- e.g. object_permanence / op-014 -->

**The setup says:** <!-- quote the relevant setup text -->

**The gold answer is:** <!-- Yes / No / value -->

**Why I think it's wrong or ambiguous:**
<!-- Your reading. A careful-adult argument is enough; no citations needed. -->

<!-- Disputed labels are the point of this project, not an embarrassment.
     Confirmed disputes get the scenario reworded or retired, with credit. -->
